prompt: What is the capital of Australia?

continuations.text: The capital of Australia is Canberra. It is located in the Australian Capital Territory (ACT), in the southeast of the country. Canberra was chosen as the capital in 1908 and officially became the capital in 1913, replacing Melbourne, which was the temporary capital at the time.
